svg.text: Whole-genome 10:10 SweepGA/F32 IMPG class winners with donor ribbons
PAN027mat_vs_PAN010_joint: PAN027 mat query; ribbons mark high-confidence 2 kb runs where the best interchromosomal match beats the best same-chromosome match.
Drawn: 25 high-confidence runs, 0.37 Mb total; threshold: run >=10 kb and mean interchrom identity >=0.95.
All coordinates are native whole-genome coordinates collapsed into length-scaled chromosome-order tracks.
